TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_hororok, title = hororok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/hororok} }

S.FORM: alang hororok ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 50 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 47 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 92%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na hororok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga walo'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang hororok ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 50 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 47 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 92%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na hororok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na hororok hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na hororok hya' ga walo'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ńßororok …£a nija mki s~…ēku ő≤jori keŇč atu s~…ēitan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, s~…ēajs~…ēijat **%, tajan *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ńßororok ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ńßororok ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ńßororok ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na ńßororok ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ńßororok ńßja Ē …£a walo Ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
